title: ClaudeLiveState
description: Live tracking of Claude Code session state for the Hantavirus Nuble pipeline. Written by the main Claude Code instance and polled by W0/W12/W14. Monotonic version + heartbeat_sequence guarantee staleness detection.

version.description: Monotonically increasing schema version of this state document. Must never decrease.

heartbeat_sequence.description: Monotonically increasing heartbeat counter, bumped on every write by Claude Code.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the last write.

session_deadline.description: Optional ISO8601 deadline for the current session (e.g. manuscript submission deadline).

current_block.description: Identifier of the current block being executed (e.g. B1, B2.1).

current_block_label.description: Human-readable label of the current block.

overall_status.description: Overall execution status of the session.

agent.description: Name of the active agent (e.g. claude-code-main, sub-agent-B1.1).

methodology.description: Methodology or protocol in use (e.g. 5-phase anti-bypass, sequential-thinking).

sub_blocks.description: List of sub-blocks composing the current block.

agent_type.description: Type of agent assigned (e.g. sonnet, haiku, opus, task-tool).

output_path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path where the sub-block output is written.

blocked_by.description: List of sub-block IDs that must complete before this one can run.

output_refs.description: Paths/URLs of artifacts produced by the sub-block (set by finalize()).

duration_s.description: Wall-clock seconds spent by the sub-block.

detail.description: Free-form note attached to the sub-block (e.g. current activity).

traceback.description: Optional full traceback string on error.

current_findings.description: Short strings describing findings already obtained in the current block.

next_planned.description: Short strings describing what is planned next.

tool_calls_total.description: Cumulative count of tool calls executed in the current session.

files_touched.description: List of absolute or repo-relative paths of files touched in the current session.

other_terminals.description: List of other terminals currently attached to the project.

eta_estimate.description: Optional ETA estimate for the current block and overall work.

current_block_eta_min.description: Expected wall-clock minutes until current block completes.

m14_preflight.description: Preflight indicators for the M14 (anti-bypass) methodology.

catalog_consulted.description: Whether the canonical catalog was consulted before acting.

catalog_path.description: Path to the catalog that was consulted.

findings_classified.description: Whether findings have been classified per M14 taxonomy. Boolean when workers set it; string allowed for human-readable notes like 'N/A (infrastructure build)'.
